narrative:
Fairborn 210 (precinct in Greene County) has 621 registered voters, with 68.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.4 percentage points.
